shows.name: Hour of Anarchy
shows.desc: I play punk and metal and I'll talk about it too.

shows.name: A Tribute To Emerging Singers
shows.desc: Welcome aboard listeners! This show will delve into some of the emerging singers (from all genres) that you should be listening to right now if you aren't already.

shows.name: camp night with bear dentist
shows.desc: Camp Night is a sunset show, presenting comfy music to ease your afternoons and nights. Fuzzy indie music, ambient electronic, and all other kinds of hopeful music - set up a shortwave radio and watch the sky turn orange.

shows.name: Sound Of Mayhem
shows.desc: This will be the heaviest set ever heard.
